name: cost-centre-brief
description: Brief on cost centre CC-0031 (Cleveland Plant Operations).
input_message: Brief me on cost-centre CC-0031 — how is the Cleveland plant tracking against budget?
expected_behavior: Calls cost-centre-brief (sap_get_cost_centre + sap_list_journal_entries with cost_centre='CC-0031'). Reports owner as Wesley Park (EMP-1031), budget $14.5M, YTD $7.24M, ~50% consumed. Lists recent JEs touching the cost centre. Notes whether any are Manual or large round numbers.
